# Pillars — robolawyer-tm

> An open research ecosystem for predicting beneficial outcomes in complex human
> situations using analogical synthesis — bridging semantic and digital processing
> on local, privacy-preserving hardware. Built by robolawyer-tm.

## Architecture

- [Pillars — Architectural Vision](/): Core system design document covering the
  semantic-digital duality, Vivify engine, and the four supporting pillars.

## Blog

- [Blog Index](/blog/): All writing on analogical synthesis, local-first systems,
  and beneficial outcome modeling.
- [Why the Filesystem Is the Database](/blog/filesystem-is-the-database/): On the
  radical simplicity of JSON files over database engines, and data sovereignty.
- [Analogical vs Dialectical Synthesis](/blog/analogical-vs-dialectical/): Why
  LLMs default to Hegelian resolution and why that fails social science.

## Repositories

- [star-bridge](https://github.com/robolawyer-tm/star-bridge): SSH admin connection
  manager, phone discovery, mesh networking prototype.
- [secret-server](https://github.com/robolawyer-tm/secret-server): Hardened Flask
  app on Android/Termux with autovivification storage.
- [pillars](https://github.com/robolawyer-tm/pillars): Architectural vision and
  design philosophy.

## Key Concepts

- **Analogical synthesis**: LLM-driven pattern recognition rooted in felt meaning,
  not dialectical compromise.
- **Vivify**: Schema-free semantic data engine using filesystem-as-database with
  autovivified JSON structures.
- **Local-first**: Zero cloud dependencies; all computation and storage on
  participant-owned hardware (Android/Termux).
- **Human-centric security**: Physical proximity and manual approval as primary
  trust signals, via SSH mesh networking.

## Optional

- [RSS Feed](/rss.xml): Subscribe to new posts.
- [llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt): Extended content dump for deep AI indexing.
